title: Device Home Screen - Bluetooth turned off
scenario: Verify headset connection status updates correctly in the device list when Bluetooth is toggled off and back on while the app is running.
steps: Launch the app with a Bluetooth headset already connected.
Turn off Bluetooth on the device while the app is running.
Observe the device list in the app.
Reconnect the headset via mobile Bluetooth settings.
Observe the device list in the app again.
expected: When Bluetooth is turned off, the headset should be shown as disconnected in the device list. When Bluetooth is turned back on and the headset is reconnected via mobile Bluetooth settings, the headset should be shown as connected in the device list.
